title: The Ameicanized update
description: Freedom cannot wait! find some oil and trade it for arrow launcher! detail in description
body:
NEW UPTADE 2.0 OUT!

find the new oily biome and mine for oil! capture the oil in a bucket. you will need it later. go to the village, place tnt beside the unemployed villager and you will get american dude! trade him the oil to get arrow launcher, a powerfull weapon that shoots fire arrows at high speed!
